subject: Cancel before renewal
description: I cancelled this morning. Will my workspace stay active until the end of the month?
resolution: Confirmed cancellation; access remains until the current billing period ends.

subject: Where is the cancel button
description: I am an owner but cannot find where to cancel our Pro subscription.
resolution: Directed owner to Settings > Billing > Manage subscription > Cancel plan.

subject: Can an admin cancel
description: Can our workspace admin cancel or does it have to be the account owner?
resolution: Only the workspace owner can cancel the subscription.

subject: Reactivate cancelled workspace
description: We cancelled yesterday but changed our mind. Can we restore the subscription before it ends?
resolution: Owner reactivated from Billing before the period end date.

subject: Data after cancellation
description: What happens to our projects when the paid period ends?
resolution: Explained that the workspace becomes read-only for 30 days before deletion review.

subject: Refund after annual cancellation
description: We cancelled our annual plan after two weeks. Are we eligible for a refund?
resolution: Approved a full refund because the request was within the 14-day first-purchase window.

subject: Prorated refund for unused months
description: We have ten months left on annual billing. Will those months be refunded?
resolution: Denied prorated refund because the request was outside the 14-day first-purchase window.

subject: Charged after cancelling
description: I cancelled on renewal day but the card was charged. Can the charge be reversed?
resolution: Refunded because cancellation occurred before the renewal cutoff timestamp.

subject: Refund for accidental renewal
description: We forgot to cancel and renewed yesterday. Can you make an exception?
resolution: Approved one-time renewal refund requested within 48 hours with no post-renewal usage.

subject: Monthly plan refund
description: I cancelled a monthly plan after five days. Do monthly plans get the 14-day refund window?
resolution: Confirmed the 14-day first-purchase window applies to monthly and annual plans.

subject: Second subscription refund
description: We previously had Pro, returned this month, and cancelled. Does the cooling-off period apply again?
resolution: Denied because the 14-day window applies only to the first paid subscription per workspace.

subject: Refund after downgrading
description: We downgraded from Business to Pro. Can we get back the price difference?
resolution: Issued account credit for the unused Business portion; no cash refund.

subject: Refund to closed card
description: Our refund was approved but the original card is closed. Where will the money go?
resolution: Refund must return to the original payment method; customer was told to contact the card issuer.

subject: How long does a refund take
description: Support approved our cancellation refund. When should it appear?
resolution: Advised 5–10 business days after approval depending on the bank.

subject: Wrong company name on invoice
description: Our May invoice has our old legal entity. Can it be corrected?
resolution: Updated billing profile and regenerated the latest invoice.

subject: Add VAT number
description: Where can I add our VAT ID so it appears on future invoices?
resolution: Directed owner to Billing profile > Tax information; future invoices update automatically.

subject: Correct an older invoice
description: Can you change the address on an invoice from six months ago?
resolution: Historical finalized invoice could not be edited; issued a correction note.

subject: Download all invoices
description: I need every invoice from this year for our audit.
resolution: Directed user to Billing > Invoices and the Download all CSV action.

subject: Invoice currency change
description: Can our USD invoice be reissued in EUR?
resolution: Denied reissue; currency changes apply from the next billing period.

subject: Configure SAML SSO
description: How do I connect Okta SAML to our Business workspace?
resolution: Followed the admin guide and verified metadata, ACS URL, and domain.

subject: SSO certificate expired
description: Users see a signature validation error after our certificate rotation.
resolution: Uploaded the new IdP certificate and re-tested the connection.

subject: Enforce SSO
description: Can we require SSO for everyone after testing it?
resolution: Enabled Enforce SSO after verifying a recovery admin login.

subject: SSO on Pro plan
description: I cannot see SAML settings in our Pro workspace.
resolution: Explained SAML SSO is available only on Business and Enterprise.

subject: Multiple verified domains
description: Can one workspace verify two company domains for SSO?
resolution: Confirmed multiple domains are supported but each must be verified separately.

subject: Remove a paid seat
description: We removed a teammate. When does our billed seat count change?
resolution: Seat count dropped immediately; credit applies on the next invoice.

subject: Add seats mid-cycle
description: If we add three people today, are the new seats prorated?
resolution: Confirmed added seats are prorated for the remaining billing period.

subject: Transfer workspace ownership
description: Our owner left the company. How can an admin take ownership?
resolution: Verified company-domain admin and completed an ownership recovery workflow.

subject: Guest versus member
description: Does a read-only guest consume a paid seat?
resolution: Confirmed guests do not consume seats on Business, subject to guest limits.

subject: CSV row limit
description: My analytics CSV stops at 10,000 rows. Is that the maximum?
resolution: Explained Business is limited to 10,000 rows per export.

subject: Enterprise export limit
description: Our Enterprise export stops at 10,000 rows even though sales promised more.
resolution: Enabled the Enterprise 50,000-row entitlement and re-ran the export.

subject: Export all events
description: Can an Enterprise admin export 45,000 audit events in one CSV?
resolution: Confirmed Enterprise supports up to 50,000 rows per export.

subject: Split a large export
description: How do we export 80,000 records without losing rows?
resolution: Recommended two date-range exports because even Enterprise caps each file at 50,000 rows.
